prestazioni: Engine: F106 AL 000 2.9L V8 (Dino-derived) with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft grind (intake/exhaust) and titanium retainers from Ferrea Racing Components.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Novitec Rosso, feeding into a GReddy Profec B Spec II standalone ECU with Motec M150 piggyback for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Intercooled via a PWR 4.5-inch core front-mount intercooler with -10AN silicone hoses from Vibrant Performance.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) with a custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio, paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) and a lightweight flywheel from Fidanza. Transmission reinforced with a Tran-X short-shift kit and SynchroMedic carbon synchros for the 5-speed manual.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Ferrari 308 GT4 kit), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets by Novitec Rosso. Front splitter and rear wing from 9 Lives Racing (308 GT4-specific aero).

Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x9.5 ET25 (front) and 18x11 ET15 (rear) with custom offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear). Brake system upgraded to Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather, including Recaro Pole Position seats (Ferrari-specific mounting brackets), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in design). Digital dash upgrade with a Race Technology DL1 data logger and AIM MXS Strada display.
